scripts.test:auth: npm run testdata:prepare && npx playwright test tests/auth/auth.orchestrator.spec.ts --project=auth
scripts.test:auth:smoke: npm run testdata:prepare && npx playwright test tests/auth/auth.orchestrator.spec.ts --project=auth --grep @smoke
scripts.test:auth:regression: npm run testdata:prepare && npx playwright test tests/auth/auth.orchestrator.spec.ts --project=auth --grep @regression
scripts.test:user: npm run testdata:prepare && npx playwright test tests/Users/user.orchestrator.spec.ts --project=users
scripts.test:email: npm run testdata:prepare && npx playwright test tests/emails/email.orchestrator.spec.ts --project=emails
